endpoints.name: GET /api/AccountTypes
endpoints.description:
Description: This operation retrieves all Account Types for the specified country.
Purpose: Provides access to the Account Types including id and type description.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required.

endpoints.name: GET /api/AccountTypes/{id}
endpoints.description:
Description: This operation retrieves all Account Types for the specified id.
Purpose: Provides access to the Account Types including id and type description.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: GET /api/Accounts
endpoints.description:
Description: This operation retrieves all Accounts for the specified Fact Finder ID and/or external source ID.
Purpose: Provides access to the Account information including description and market value.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required.

endpoints.name: POST /api/Accounts
endpoints.description:
Description: The operation creates an Account.
Purpose: Allows for creation of Accounts on a Fact Finder.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required.

endpoints.name: GET /api/Accounts/{accountId}/Holdings
endpoints.description: Retrieves all holdings in the specified Account.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ACCOUNTID}} with a real accountid.

endpoints.name: POST /api/Accounts/{accountId}/Holdings
endpoints.description: Creates a holding and adds it to an existing Account.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ACCOUNTID}} with a real accountid.

endpoints.name: PUT /api/Accounts/{accountId}/Holdings
endpoints.description: Updates all holdings associated with an account
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ACCOUNTID}} with a real accountid.

endpoints.name: GET /api/Accounts/{accountId}/Holdings/{id}
endpoints.description:
Description: This operation retrieves a single Account Holding for the specified Account Holding ID and Account ID.
Purpose: Provides access to the Account Holding information including description and market value.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id. Replace {{ACCOUNTID}} with a real accountid.

endpoints.name: PUT /api/Accounts/{accountId}/Holdings/{id}
endpoints.description: Updates a holding associated with an account
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id. Replace {{ACCOUNTID}} with a real accountid.

endpoints.name: DELETE /api/Accounts/{accountId}/Holdings/{id}
endpoints.description:
Description: This operation deletes a single Account Holding for the specified Account Holding ID and Account ID.
Purpose: Provides the ability to remove individual holdings from a specified Account.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id. Replace {{ACCOUNTID}} with a real accountid.

endpoints.name: GET /api/Accounts/{accountId}/SavingsStrategies
endpoints.description: Get all of the savings strategies for a specific account
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ACCOUNTID}} with a real accountid.

endpoints.name: POST /api/Accounts/{accountId}/SavingsStrategies
endpoints.description: Creates a savings strategy on a specific account
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ACCOUNTID}} with a real accountid.

endpoints.name: DELETE /api/Accounts/{accountId}/SavingsStrategies
endpoints.description: Deletes all savings strategies tied to an account
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ACCOUNTID}} with a real accountid.

endpoints.name: GET /api/Accounts/{accountId}/SavingsStrategies/{id}
endpoints.description: Get a specific savings strategy for an account
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id. Replace {{ACCOUNTID}} with a real accountid.

endpoints.name: PUT /api/Accounts/{accountId}/SavingsStrategies/{id}
endpoints.description: Updates a specific savings strategy
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id. Replace {{ACCOUNTID}} with a real accountid.

endpoints.name: DELETE /api/Accounts/{accountId}/SavingsStrategies/{id}
endpoints.description: Deletes a specific savings strategy
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id. Replace {{ACCOUNTID}} with a real accountid.

endpoints.name: GET /api/Accounts/{id}
endpoints.description:
Description: This operation retrieves a single Account for the specified Account ID.
Purpose: Provides access to the Account information including description and market value.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: PUT /api/Accounts/{id}
endpoints.description:
Description: The operation updates an Account, deletes associated saving strategies if the account type changes.
Purpose: Allows for complete replacement of an Account on a Fact Finder.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: DELETE /api/Accounts/{id}
endpoints.description:
Description: The operation removes an Account tied to a Fact Finder.
Purpose: Allows for removal of an Account from a Fact Finder.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: POST /api/Clients
endpoints.description:
Description: This operation submits the Fact Finder data to an external system.
Purpose: Allows Fact Finder data to be persisted in another system for that system's consumption and use.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required.

endpoints.name: GET /api/DefinedBenefitPensions
endpoints.description:
Description: This operation retrieves all Defined Benefit Pensions for the specified Fact Finder ID.
Purpose: Provides access to the Defined Benefit Pensions including description and start date.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required.

endpoints.name: POST /api/DefinedBenefitPensions
endpoints.description:
Description: The operation creates a Defined Benefit Pension.
Purpose: Allows for creation of Defined Benefit Pensions on a Fact Finder.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required.

endpoints.name: GET /api/DefinedBenefitPensions/{id}
endpoints.description:
Description: This operation retrieves a single Defined Benefit Pension for the specified Defined Benefit Pension ID.
Purpose: Provides access to the Defined Benefit Pension including description and start date.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: PUT /api/DefinedBenefitPensions/{id}
endpoints.description:
Description: The operation updates a Defined Benefit Pension.
Purpose: Allows for complete replacement of a Defined Benefit Pension on a Fact Finder.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: DELETE /api/DefinedBenefitPensions/{id}
endpoints.description:
Description: The operation removes a Defined Benefit Pension tied to a Fact Finder.
Purpose: Allows for removal of a Defined Benefit Pension from a Fact Finder.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: GET /api/Demographics
endpoints.description:
Description: This operation retrieves all Demographic information for the specified Fact Finder ID.
Purpose: Provides access to the Demographic information including city and state.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required.

endpoints.name: POST /api/Demographics
endpoints.description:
Description: The operation creates Demographic information.
Purpose: Allows for creation of Demographic information on a Fact Finder.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required.

endpoints.name: GET /api/Demographics/{demographicId}/Dependents
endpoints.description:
Description: This operation retrieves all Dependents for the specified Demographic information ID.
Purpose: Provides access to the Dependents including first and last name.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{DEMOGRAPHICID}} with a real demographicid.

endpoints.name: POST /api/Demographics/{demographicId}/Dependents
endpoints.description:
Description: The operation creates a Dependent.
Purpose: Allows for creation of Dependents on a Fact Finder.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{DEMOGRAPHICID}} with a real demographicid.

endpoints.name: GET /api/Demographics/{demographicId}/Dependents/{id}
endpoints.description:
Description: This operation retrieves a single Dependent for the specified Dependent ID.
Purpose: Provides access to the Dependent including first and last name.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id. Replace {{DEMOGRAPHICID}} with a real demographicid.

endpoints.name: PUT /api/Demographics/{demographicId}/Dependents/{id}
endpoints.description:
Description: The operation updates a Dependent.
Purpose: Allows for complete replacement of a Dependent on a Fact Finder.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id. Replace {{DEMOGRAPHICID}} with a real demographicid.

endpoints.name: DELETE /api/Demographics/{demographicId}/Dependents/{id}
endpoints.description:
Description: The operation removes a Dependent tied to a Fact Finder.
Purpose: Allows for removal of a Dependent from a Fact Finder.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id. Replace {{DEMOGRAPHICID}} with a real demographicid.

endpoints.name: GET /api/Demographics/{id}
endpoints.description:
Description: This operation retrieves Demographic information for the specified Demographic information ID.
Purpose: Provides access to the Demographic information including city and state.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: PUT /api/Demographics/{id}
endpoints.description:
Description: The operation updates Demographic information.
Purpose: Allows for complete replacement of Demographic information on a Fact Finder.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: GET /api/DisabilityInsurancePolicies
endpoints.description:
Description: This operation retrieves all Disability Insurance Policies for the specified Fact Finder ID.
Purpose: Provides access to the Disability Insurance Policies including description and policy type.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required.

endpoints.name: GET /api/DisabilityInsurancePolicies/{id}

Purpose: Provides access to the Disability Insurance Policy including description and policy type.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: PUT /api/DisabilityInsurancePolicies/{id}
endpoints.description:
Description: The operation updates a Disability Insurance Policy.
Purpose: Allows for complete replacement of a Disability Insurance Policy on a Fact Finder.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: DELETE /api/DisabilityInsurancePolicies/{id}
endpoints.description:
Description: The operation removes a Disability Insurance Policy tied to a Fact Finder.
Purpose: Allows for removal of a Disability Insurance Policy from a Fact Finder.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: GET /api/DisabilityInsurancePolicyTypes
endpoints.description:
Description: This operation retrieves all Disability Insurance Policy Types for the specified country.
Purpose: Provides access to the Disability Insurance Policy Types including id and type description.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required.

endpoints.name: GET /api/DisabilityInsurancePolicyTypes/{id}
endpoints.description:
Description: This operation retrieves all Disability Insurance Policy Types for the specified id.
Purpose: Provides access to the Disability Insurance Policy Types including id and type description.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: GET /api/EducationGoals
endpoints.description:
Description: This operation retrieves all Education Goals for the specified Fact Finder ID.
Purpose: Provides access to the Education Goals including description and projected cost.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required.

endpoints.name: POST /api/EducationGoals
endpoints.description:
Description: The operation creates an Education Goal.
Purpose: Allows for creation of Education Goals on a Fact Finder.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required.

endpoints.name: GET /api/EducationGoals/{educationGoalId}/Expenses
endpoints.description:
Description: This operation retrieves all Education Goal Expenses for the specified Education Goal ID.
Purpose: Provides access to the Education Goal Expenses including description and annual cost.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{EDUCATIONGOALID}} with a real educationgoalid.

endpoints.name: POST /api/EducationGoals/{educationGoalId}/Expenses
endpoints.description:
Description: The operation creates an Education Goal Expense.
Purpose: Allows for creation of Education Goal Expenses on a Fact Finder.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{EDUCATIONGOALID}} with a real educationgoalid.

endpoints.name: GET /api/EducationGoals/{educationGoalId}/Expenses/{id}
endpoints.description:
Description: This operation retrieves a single Education Goal Expense for the specified Education Goal Expense ID.
Purpose: Provides access to the Education Goal Expense including description and annual cost.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id. Replace {{EDUCATIONGOALID}} with a real educationgoalid.

endpoints.name: PUT /api/EducationGoals/{educationGoalId}/Expenses/{id}
endpoints.description:
Description: The operation updates an Education Goal Expense.
Purpose: Allows for complete replacement of an Education Goal Expense on a Fact Finder.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id. Replace {{EDUCATIONGOALID}} with a real educationgoalid.

endpoints.name: DELETE /api/EducationGoals/{educationGoalId}/Expenses/{id}
endpoints.description:
Description: The operation removes an Education Goal Expense tied to a Fact Finder.
Purpose: Allows for removal of an Education Goal Expense from a Fact Finder.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id. Replace {{EDUCATIONGOALID}} with a real educationgoalid.

endpoints.name: GET /api/EducationGoals/{id}
endpoints.description:
Description: This operation retrieves a single Education Goal for the specified Education Goal ID.
Purpose: Provides access to the Education Goal including description and projected cost.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: PUT /api/EducationGoals/{id}
endpoints.description:
Description: The operation creates an Education Goal Expense.
Purpose: Allows for creation of Education Goal Expenses on a Fact Finder.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: DELETE /api/EducationGoals/{id}
endpoints.description:
Description: The operation removes an Education Goal tied to a Fact Finder.
Purpose: Allows for removal of an Education Goal from a Fact Finder.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: GET /api/ExpenseTypes
endpoints.description:
Description: This operation retrieves all Expense Types for the specified country.
Purpose: Provides access to the Expense Types including id and type description.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required.

endpoints.name: GET /api/ExpenseTypes/{id}
endpoints.description:
Description: This operation retrieves all Expense Types for the specified country.
Purpose: Provides access to the Expense Types including id and type description.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: GET /api/Expenses
endpoints.description:
Description: This operation retrieves all Expenses for the specified Fact Finder ID.
Purpose: Provides access to the Expenses including description and Expense type.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required.

endpoints.name: POST /api/Expenses
endpoints.description:
Description: The operation creates an Expense.
Purpose: Allows for creation of Expenses on a Fact Finder.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required.

endpoints.name: GET /api/Expenses/{id}
endpoints.description:
Description: This operation retrieves a single Expense for the specified Expense ID.
Purpose: Provides access to the Expense including description and Expense type.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: PUT /api/Expenses/{id}
endpoints.description:
Description: The operation updates an Expense.
Purpose: Allows for complete replacement of an Expense on a Fact Finder.

Note: Expense type cannot be changed for expenses prepopulated from NaviPlan.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: DELETE /api/Expenses/{id}
endpoints.description:
Description: The operation removes an Expense tied to a Fact Finder.
Purpose: Allows for removal of an Expense from a Fact Finder.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: GET /api/FactFinders
endpoints.description:
Description: This operation retrieves all Fact Finders for the specified householdId, or if null, all households associated with the user.
Purpose: Provides access to the Fact Finder including status.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required.

endpoints.name: POST /api/FactFinders
endpoints.description:
Description: The operation creates a completely empty draft Fact Finder.
Requirements: A householdId and list of modules must be provided.
Purpose: Stages a Fact Finder for population.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required.

endpoints.name: POST /api/FactFinders/Populate
endpoints.description:
Description: The operation creates a new Populated Fact Finder.
Requirements: A householdId and list of modules must be provided.
Purpose: Creation of a Fact Finder.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required.

endpoints.name: GET /api/FactFinders/{factFinderId}/Modules
endpoints.description:
Description: This operation retrieves all Fact Finder Modules for the specified Fact Finder ID.
Purpose: Provides access to the Fact Finder Modules including description and policy type.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{FACTFINDERID}} with a real factfinderid.

endpoints.name: GET /api/FactFinders/{factFinderId}/Modules/{id}
endpoints.description:
Description: This operation retrieves a single Fact Finder Module for the specified Fact Finder Module ID.
Purpose: Provides access to the Fact Finder Module including description and policy type.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id. Replace {{FACTFINDERID}} with a real factfinderid.

endpoints.name: PUT /api/FactFinders/{factFinderId}/Modules/{id}
endpoints.description:
Description: The operation updates a Fact Finder Module.
Purpose: Allows for complete replacement of a Fact Finder Module on a Fact Finder.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id. Replace {{FACTFINDERID}} with a real factfinderid.

endpoints.name: GET /api/FactFinders/{factFinderId}/Snapshots
endpoints.description:
Description: The operation retrieves Snapshots of a Fact Finder.
Purpose: Allows for advisors to view all Snapshots taken of a Fact Finder.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{FACTFINDERID}} with a real factfinderid.

endpoints.name: POST /api/FactFinders/{factFinderId}/Snapshots
endpoints.description:
Description: The operation creates a Snapshot of a Fact Finder.
Purpose: Allows for advisors to compare the current fact finder to a snapshot prior to acceptance.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{FACTFINDERID}} with a real factfinderid.

endpoints.name: GET /api/FactFinders/{id}
endpoints.description:
Description: This operation retrieves a single Fact Finder for the specified Fact Finder ID.
Purpose: Provides access to the Fact Finder including status.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: PUT /api/FactFinders/{id}
endpoints.description:
Description: The operation updates a Fact Finder.
Purpose: Allows for the updating of a Fact Finder.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: DELETE /api/FactFinders/{id}
endpoints.description:
Description: This operation deletes a single Fact Finder for the specified Fact Finder ID.
Purpose: Deletes the fact finder.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: PUT /api/FactFinders/{id}/Populate
endpoints.description:
Description: The operation populates a fact finder.
Purpose: Allows for the population of a Fact Finder based on a NaviPlan plan or client. This operation cannot be performed on a Fact Finder more than once.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: GET /api/FilingStatusTypes
endpoints.description:
Description: This operation retrieves all Filing Status Types for the specified country.
Purpose: Provides access to the Filing Status Types including id and type description.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required.

endpoints.name: GET /api/FilingStatusTypes/{id}
endpoints.description:
Description: This operation retrieves all Filing Status Type for the specified id.
Purpose: Provides access to the Filing Status Types including id and type description.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: GET /api/FrequencyTypes
endpoints.description:

Purpose: Provides access to the Frequency Types including id and type description.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required.

endpoints.name: GET /api/FrequencyTypes/{id}
endpoints.description:
Description: This operation retrieves the Frequency Type for the specified id.
Purpose: Provides access to the Frequency Types including id and type description.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

Purpose: Provides access to the Income Types including id and type description.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required.

endpoints.name: GET /api/IncomeTypes/{id}
endpoints.description:
Description: This operation retrieves the Income Type for the specified id.
Purpose: Provides access to the Income Types including id and type description.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

Purpose: Provides access to the Incomes including annual amount and start date.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required.

endpoints.name: POST /api/Incomes
endpoints.description:
Description: The operation creates an Income.

endpoints.name: GET /api/Incomes/{id}
endpoints.description:

endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: PUT /api/Incomes/{id}
endpoints.description:

endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.description:
Description: The operation removes an Income tied to a Fact Finder.
Purpose: Allows for removal of an Income from a Fact Finder.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

Description: This operation retrieves all Liabilities for the specified Fact Finder ID.
Purpose: Provides access to the Liabilities including owner and type.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required.

endpoints.name: POST /api/Liabilities

Description: The operation creates a Liability.
Purpose: Allows for creation of Liabilities on a Fact Finder.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required.

endpoints.description:
Description: This operation retrieves a single Liability for the specified Liability ID.

endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: GET /api/LifeInsurancePolicies
endpoints.description:
Description: This operation retrieves all Life Insurance Policies for the specified Fact Finder ID.
Purpose: Provides access to the Life Insurance Policies including description and policy type.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required.

endpoints.name: POST /api/LifeInsurancePolicies
endpoints.description:
Description: The operation creates a Life Insurance Policy.
Purpose: Allows for creation of Life Insurance Policies on a Fact Finder.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required.

endpoints.name: GET /api/LifeInsurancePolicies/{id}
endpoints.description:
Description: This operation retrieves a single Life Insurance Policy for the specified Life Insurance Policy ID.
Purpose: Provides access to the Life Insurance Policy including description and policy type.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: PUT /api/LifeInsurancePolicies/{id}
endpoints.description:
Description: The operation updates a Life Insurance Policy, deletes associated sub-accounts if the policy type changes.
Purpose: Allows for complete replacement of a Life Insurance Policy on a Fact Finder.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: DELETE /api/LifeInsurancePolicies/{id}
endpoints.description:
Description: The operation removes a Life Insurance Policy tied to a Fact Finder.
Purpose: Allows for removal of a Life Insurance Policy and associated subaccounts from a Fact Finder.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: GET /api/LifeInsurancePolicies/{lifeInsurancePolicyId}/Subaccounts
endpoints.description:
Description: Get all the subaccounts for an existing Life Insurance Policy.
Purpose: Provides access to all the Life Insurance Policy subaccounts.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{LIFEINSURANCEPOLICYID}} with a real lifeinsurancepolicyid.

endpoints.name: POST /api/LifeInsurancePolicies/{lifeInsurancePolicyId}/Subaccounts
endpoints.description:
Description: Creates a subaccount and adds it to an existing Life Insurance Policy.
Purpose: Allows for creation of subaccount on a Life Insurance Policy.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{LIFEINSURANCEPOLICYID}} with a real lifeinsurancepolicyid.

endpoints.name: GET /api/LifeInsurancePolicies/{lifeInsurancePolicyId}/Subaccounts/{id}
endpoints.description:
Description: Get a specific subaccount for an existing Life Insurance Policy.
Purpose: Provides access to the Life Insurance Policy subaccount.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{LIFEINSURANCEPOLICYID}} with a real lifeinsurancepolicyid. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: PUT /api/LifeInsurancePolicies/{lifeInsurancePolicyId}/Subaccounts/{id}
endpoints.description:
Description: Updates an existing Life Insurance Policy Subaccount for an existing Life Insurance Policy.
Purpose: Allows for complete replacement of a subaccount on a Life Insurance Policy.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{LIFEINSURANCEPOLICYID}} with a real lifeinsurancepolicyid. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: DELETE /api/LifeInsurancePolicies/{lifeInsurancePolicyId}/Subaccounts/{id}
endpoints.description:
Description: Deletes an existing Life Insurance Policy Subaccount for an existing Life Insurance Policy.
Purpose: Allows for removal of a subaccount from a Life Insurance Policy.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{LIFEINSURANCEPOLICYID}} with a real lifeinsurancepolicyid. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: GET /api/LifeInsurancePolicyTypes
endpoints.description:
Description: This operation retrieves all Life Insurance Policy Types for the specified country.
Purpose: Provides access to the Life Insurance Policy Types including id and type description.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required.

endpoints.name: GET /api/LifeInsurancePolicyTypes/{id}
endpoints.description:
Description: This operation retrieves the Life Insurance Policy Type for the specified id.
Purpose: Provides access to the Life Insurance Policy Types including id and type description.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: GET /api/LifestyleAssetTypes
endpoints.description:
Description: This operation retrieves all Lifestyle Asset Types for the specified country.

endpoints.name: GET /api/Presentation/Accounts
endpoints.description:
Description: This operation retrieves all current Accounts for the specified Fact Finder ID, as well as all of the holdings and savings strategies belonging to those accounts.
Purpose: Provides access to the Accounts in a Fact Finder as well as any sub-entities belonging to them.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required.

endpoints.name: GET /api/Presentation/Demographics/Owners
endpoints.description:
Description: This operation retrieves owner values for the fact finder based on demographics data
              Purpose: Provides the list of valid options for owner, student, beneficiary, etc.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required.

endpoints.name: GET /api/Presentation/Demographics/Relationships
endpoints.description:
Description: This operation retrieves all relationship types relevant to demographics.
Purpose: Provides a list of relationship types organized by whether or not they can be defined as children.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required.

endpoints.name: GET /api/Presentation/Incomes
endpoints.description:

Purpose: Provides access to the Incomes in a Fact Finder, filtered by Incomes that are current.
